subcodes.first_line: O ye who are attracted! O ye who are united! O ye who are believers and assured! Glad-tidings unto you for that ye believed in God
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
